question: What is the full list of hook events a charm can observe? List them all.

claude_output.result:
Here is the **complete list of hook events** a Juju charm can observe:

---

### Lifecycle Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `install` | Fired once when the unit is first deployed |
| `start` | Fired after `install` to start the workload |
| `config-changed` | Fired when the charm's configuration changes |
| `upgrade-charm` | Fired when the charm is upgraded |
| `update-status` | Fired periodically (every ~5 min) for status polling |
| `stop` | Fired when the unit is about to be stopped |
| `remove` | Fired when the unit is being destroyed/removed |

### Leadership Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `leader-elected` | Fired when the unit becomes the application leader |
| `leader-settings-changed` | Fired when leader settings data changes |

### Relation Hooks
*(Prefixed with `<endpoint>-`, e.g. `database-relation-joined`)*

| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `<endpoint>-relation-created` | A new relation has been created |
| `<endpoint>-relation-joined` | A new remote unit has joined the relation |
| `<endpoint>-relation-changed` | Relation data has been modified |
| `<endpoint>-relation-departed` | A remote unit is leaving the relation |
| `<endpoint>-relation-broken` | The relation is being completely removed |

### Storage Hooks
*(Prefixed with `<storage-name>-`, e.g. `data-storage-attached`)*

| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `<storage>-storage-attached` | Storage has been attached to the unit |
| `<storage>-storage-detaching` | Storage is about to be detached |

### Secret Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `secret-changed` | A tracked secret's content has been updated |
| `secret-expired` | A secret owned by this charm has expired |
| `secret-rotate` | A secret owned by this charm is due for rotation |
| `secret-remove` | A secret revision owned by this charm can be removed |

### Workload / Pebble Hooks *(Kubernetes sidecar charms only)*
*(Prefixed with `<container>-`, e.g. `myapp-pebble-ready`)*

| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `<container>-pebble-ready` | The Pebble agent in the container is ready |
| `<container>-pebble-custom-notice` | A custom Pebble notice has been received |
| `<container>-pebble-check-failed` | A Pebble health check has failed |
| `<container>-pebble-check-recovered` | A Pebble health check has recovered |

### Series Upgrade Hooks *(deprecated)*
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `pre-series-upgrade` | Fired before an OS series upgrade |
| `post-series-upgrade` | Fired after an OS series upgrade |

---

That's **28 distinct hook events** in total (with relation, storage, and pebble hooks being parameterized by endpoint/storage/container name as defined in your charm's `metadata.yaml` or `charmcraft.yaml`).
